heading: Taxation of DISC income to shareholders
label: 995 Taxation of DISC income to shareholders

Proration of Base Period in Case of Fixed Contracts, , , as amended by , , ; , , , provided that:Pub. L. 94–455, title XI, § 1101(g)(5)90 Stat. 1659Pub. L. 95–600, title VII, § 703(i)(4)92 Stat. 2940Pub. L. 99–514, § 2100 Stat. 2095Oct. 4, 1976Nov. 6, 1978Oct. 22, 1986“For purposes of determining adjusted base period export gross receipts (under section 995(e)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 [formerly I.R.C. 1954], as amended by this section), if any DISC has export gross receipts from export property by reason of paragraph (2) of section 603(b) of the Tax Reduction Act of 1975, [set out as an Effective Date of 1975 Amendment note under ], then the export gross receipts of such DISC for the taxable years of the base period shall be increased by an amount equal to the amount of gross receipts which were excluded from export gross receipts during each taxable year of the base period by reason of the last sentence of section 995(e)(3) of such Code multiplied by a fraction, the numerator of which is the amount of the gross receipts in the taxable year which are export gross receipts by reason of paragraph (2) of section 603(b) of the Tax Reduction Act of 1975 and the denominator of which is the amount of total gross receipts which are excluded from export gross receipts in the taxable year by reason of subparagraph (C) or (D) of paragraph (2) of section 993(c) (determined without regard to paragraph (2) of section 603(b) of the Tax Reduction Act of 1975).”section 993 of this title

Proration of Base Period in Case of Fixed Contracts, , , as amended by , , ; , , , provided that:Pub. L. 94–455, title XI, § 1101(g)(5)90 Stat. 1659Pub. L. 95–600, title VII, § 703(i)(4)92 Stat. 2940Pub. L. 99–514, § 2100 Stat. 2095Oct. 4, 1976Nov. 6, 1978Oct. 22, 1986“For purposes of determining adjusted base period export gross receipts (under section 995(e)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 [formerly I.R.C. 1954], as amended by this section), if any DISC has export gross receipts from export property by reason of paragraph (2) of section 603(b) of the Tax Reduction Act of 1975, [set out as an Effective Date of 1975 Amendment note under ], then the export gross receipts of such DISC for the taxable years of the base period shall be increased by an amount equal to the amount of gross receipts which were excluded from export gross receipts during each taxable year of the base period by reason of the last sentence of section 995(e)(3) of such Code multiplied by a fraction, the numerator of which is the amount of the gross receipts in the taxable year which are export gross receipts by reason of paragraph (2) of section 603(b) of the Tax Reduction Act of 1975 and the denominator of which is the amount of total gross receipts which are excluded from export gross receipts in the taxable year by reason of subparagraph (C) or (D) of paragraph (2) of section 993(c) (determined without regard to paragraph (2) of section 603(b) of the Tax Reduction Act of 1975).”section 993 of this title

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: A shareholder of a DISC or former DISC shall be subject to taxation on the earnings and profits of a DISC as provided in this chapter, but subject to the modifications of this subpart.

children.label: A
children.text: the gross interest derived during the taxable year from producer’s loans,

children.label: B
children.text: the gain recognized by the DISC during the taxable year on the sale or exchange of property, other than property which in the hands of the DISC is a qualified export asset, previously transferred to it in a transaction in which gain was not recognized in whole or in part, but only to the extent that the transferor’s gain on the previous transfer was not recognized,

children.label: C
children.text: the gain (other than the gain described in subparagraph (B)) recognized by the DISC during the taxable year on the sale or exchange of property (other than property which in the hands of the DISC is stock in trade or other property described in section 1221(a)(1)) previously transferred to it in a transaction in which gain was not recognized in whole or in part, but only to the extent that the transferor’s gain on the previous transfer was not recognized and would have been treated as ordinary income if the property had been sold or exchanged rather than transferred to the DISC,

children.label: D
children.text: 50 percent of the taxable income of the DISC for the taxable year attributable to military property,

children.label: E
children.text: the taxable income of the DISC attributable to qualified export receipts of the DISC for the taxable year which exceed $10,000,000,

children.label: i
children.text: in the case of a shareholder which is a C corporation, one-seventeenth of the excess of the taxable income of the DISC for the taxable year, before reduction for any distributions during the year, over the sum of the amounts deemed distributed for the taxable year under subparagraphs (A), (B), (C), (D), and (E),

children.label: ii
children.text: an amount equal to ⁄ of the excess referred to in clause (i), multiplied by the international boycott factor determined under section 999, and1617

children.label: iii
children.text: any illegal bribe, kickback, or other payment (within the meaning of section 162(c)) paid by or on behalf of the DISC directly or indirectly to an official, employee, or agent in fact of a government, and

children.label: G
children.text: the amount of foreign investment attributable to producer’s loans (as defined in subsection (d)) of a DISC for the taxable year.

children.label: A
children.text: A shareholder of a corporation which revoked its election to be treated as a DISC or failed to satisfy the conditions of section 992(a)(1) for a taxable year shall be deemed to have received (at the time specified in subparagraph (B)) a distribution taxable as a dividend equal to his pro rata share of the DISC income of such corporation accumulated during the immediately preceding consecutive taxable years for which the corporation was a DISC.

children.label: B
children.text: Distributions described in subparagraph (A) shall be deemed to be received in equal installments on the last day of each of the 10 taxable years of the corporation following the year of the termination or disqualification described in subparagraph (A) (but in no case over more than twice the number of immediately preceding consecutive taxable years during which the corporation was a DISC).

children.heading: Taxable income attributable to military property
children.label: 3 Taxable income attributable to military property
i
children.text: the gross income of the DISC for the taxable year which is attributable to military property, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the deductions which are properly apportioned or allocated to such income.

children.heading: Military property
children.label: B Military property
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), the term “military property” means any property which is an arm, ammunition, or implement of war designated in the munitions list published pursuant to section 38 of the Arms Export Control Act ().22 U.S.C. 2778

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: For purposes of applying paragraph (1)(E), all DISC’s which are members of the same controlled group shall be treated as a single corporation.

children.heading: Allocation
children.label: B Allocation
children.text: The dollar amount under paragraph (1)(E) shall be allocated among the DISC’s which are members of the same controlled group in a manner provided in regulations prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: Gain on disposition of stock in a DISC
children.label: c Gain on disposition of stock in a DISC
A
children.text: a shareholder disposes of stock in a DISC or former DISC any gain recognized on such disposition shall be included in gross income as a dividend to the extent provided in paragraph (2), or

children.label: B
children.text: stock of a DISC or former DISC is disposed of in a transaction in which the separate corporate existence of the DISC or former DISC is terminated other than by a mere change in place of organization, however effected, any gain realized on the disposition of such stock in the transaction shall be recognized notwithstanding any other provision of this title to the extent provided in paragraph (2) and to the extent so recognized shall be included in gross income as a dividend.

children.heading: Amount included
children.label: 2 Amount included
children.text: The amounts described in paragraph (1) shall be included in gross income as a dividend to the extent of the accumulated DISC income of the DISC or former DISC which is attributable to the stock disposed of and which was accumulated in taxable years of such corporation during the period or periods the stock disposed of was held by the shareholder which disposed of such stock.

children.heading: Foreign investment attributable to DISC earnings
children.label: d Foreign investment attributable to DISC earnings
A
children.text: the net increase in foreign assets by members of the controlled group (as defined in section 993(a)(3)) which includes the DISC,

children.label: B
children.text: the actual foreign investment by domestic members of such group, or

children.label: C
children.text: the amount of outstanding producer’s loans by such DISC to members of such controlled group.

children.label: A
children.text: the amount incurred by such group to acquire assets (described in section 1231(b)) located outside the United States over,

children.label: i
children.text: the depreciation with respect to assets of such group located outside the United States;

children.label: ii
children.text: the outstanding amount of stock or debt obligations of such group issued after , to persons other than the United States persons or any member of such group;December 31, 1971

children.label: iii
children.text: one-half the earnings and profits of foreign members of such group and foreign branches of domestic members of such group;

children.label: iv
children.text: one-half the royalties and fees paid by foreign members of such group to domestic members of such group; and

children.label: v
children.text: the uncommitted transitional funds of the group as determined under paragraph (4).

children.label: A
children.text: contributions to capital of foreign members of the group by domestic members of the group after ,December 31, 1971

children.label: B
children.text: the outstanding amount of stock or debt obligations of foreign members of such group (other than normal trade indebtedness) issued after , to domestic members of such group,December 31, 1971

children.label: C
children.text: amounts transferred by domestic members of the group after , to foreign branches of such members, andDecember 31, 1971

children.label: D
children.text: one-half the earnings and profits of foreign members of such group and foreign branches of domestic members of such group for taxable years beginning after .December 31, 1971

children.label: i
children.text: the amount of stock or debt obligations of domestic members of such group outstanding on , and issued on or after , to persons other than United States persons or any members of such group, but only to the extent the taxpayer establishes that such amount constitutes a long-term borrowing for purposes of the foreign direct investment program, overDecember 31, 1971January 1, 1968

children.label: ii
children.text: the net amount of actual foreign investment by domestic members of such group during the period that such stock or debt obligations have been outstanding; and

children.label: B
children.text: the amount of liquid assets to the extent not included in subparagraph (A) held by foreign members of such group and foreign branches of domestic members of such group on , in excess of their reasonable working capital needs on such date.October 31, 1971

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: 5 Special rule
children.text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary the determinations under this subsection shall be made on a cumulative basis with proper adjustments for amounts previously taken into account.

children.heading: Certain transfers of DISC assets
children.label: e Certain transfers of DISC assets

children.text: a corporation owns, directly or indirectly, all of the stock of a subsidiary and a DISC,

the subsidiary has been engaged in the active conduct of a trade or business (within the meaning of section 355(b)) throughout the 5–year period ending on the date of the transfer and continues to be so engaged thereafter, and

during the taxable year of the subsidiary in which its stock is transferred and its preceding taxable year, such trade or business gives rise to qualified export receipts of the subsidiary and the DISC,

children.heading: Interest on DISC-related deferred tax liability
children.label: f Interest on DISC-related deferred tax liability
A
children.text: the shareholder’s DISC-related deferred tax liability for such year, and

children.label: B
children.text: the base period T-bill rate.

children.label: i
children.text: the amount which would be the tax liability of the shareholder for the taxable year if the deferred DISC income of such shareholder for such taxable year were included in gross income as ordinary income, over

children.label: ii
children.text: the actual amount of the tax liability of such shareholder for such taxable year.

children.heading: Adjustments for losses, credits, and other items
children.label: B Adjustments for losses, credits, and other items
i
children.text: to the accounts of the DISC, and

children.label: ii
children.text: to the amount of any carryover or carryback of the shareholder,

children.heading: Tax liability
children.label: C Tax liability
children.text: The term “tax liability” means the amount of the tax imposed by this chapter for the taxable year reduced by credits allowable against such tax (other than credits allowable under sections 31, 32, and 34).

children.label: i
children.text: the shareholder’s pro rata share of accumulated DISC income (for periods after 1984) of the DISC as of the close of the computation year, over

children.label: ii
children.text: the amount of the distributions-in-excess-of-income for the taxable year of the DISC following the computation year.

children.heading: Computation year
children.label: B Computation year
children.text: For purposes of applying subparagraph (A) with respect to any taxable year of a shareholder, the computation year is the taxable year of the DISC which ends with (or within) the taxable year of the shareholder which precedes the taxable year of the shareholder for which the amount of deferred DISC income is being determined.

children.label: i
children.text: the amount of actual distributions to the shareholder out of accumulated DISC income, over

children.label: ii
children.text: the shareholder’s pro rata share of the DISC income for such taxable year.

children.heading: Base period T-bill rate
children.label: 4 Base period T-bill rate
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “base period T-bill rate” means the annual rate of interest determined by the Secretary to be equivalent to the average of the 1-year constant maturity Treasury yields, as published by the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, for the 1-year period ending on September 30 of the calendar year ending with (or of the most recent calendar year ending before) the close of the taxable year of the shareholder.

children.heading: Short years
children.label: 5 Short years
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary for the application of this subsection to short years of the DISC, the shareholder, or both.

children.heading: Payment and assessment and collection of interest
children.label: 6 Payment and assessment and collection of interest
children.text: The interest accrued during any taxable year which a shareholder is required to pay under paragraph (1) shall be treated, for purposes of this title, as interest payable under section 6601 and shall be paid by the shareholder at the time the tax imposed by this chapter for such taxable year is required to be paid.

children.heading: DISC includes former DISC
children.label: 7 DISC includes former DISC
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “DISC” includes a former DISC.
any amount deemed distributed to such shareholder under subsection (b),
any actual distribution to such shareholder which under section 996 is treated as out of accumulated DISC income, and
any gain which is treated as a dividend under subsection (c),
